calcul explanation.concentration:
This tool allows you to perform a calculation which takes the concentration of a word at a time T, and the intensity of these words in all the runs.
Then divide it by two values ​​before multiplying it across all the corpora where the words are present: thus obtaining a saliency score.
Example:
The concentration of war is Average: 1.905347931711538 on 755 input therefore obtains a score of 0.0025236396446510437 => a recurring signal
The concentration of moon is Average: 32.694038373686624 on 44 input therefore obtains a score of 0.743046326674696 => a rare signal
The concentration of write is Average: 359.6344221105528 on 4 input therefore obtains a score of 89.9086055276382 => A weak signal requiring further investigation
